description: Contract governing the handoff of constraint-classified intent envelopes from the Constraint Class Engine to the Constraint Filter Context.

intent_id.description: ID of the originating intent from IDE.

intent_type.description: Intent classification carried forward from IDE.

normalized_signal.description: Normalized signal text carried forward from IDE.

constraint_classes.description: Constraint class tags assigned by CCE. May be empty array if no constraints apply.

drift_score.description: Semantic drift score computed by CCE. 0.0 = no drift.

flagged.description: True if CCE raised any flag on this envelope.

flag_reason.description: Human-readable reason for flag. Present only when flagged=true.

guarantees: intent_id references a valid IDE intent that passed IDE_CCE contract.
constraint_classes is present (may be empty array).
flag_reason is present if and only if flagged=true.
timestamp is a valid UTC ISO-8601 string.

MISSING_CONSTRAINT_CLASSES.description: constraint_classes field is absent (null or missing).
MISSING_CONSTRAINT_CLASSES.escalation: Log and emit CCE_ERROR event. Do not forward to CFC.

DRIFT_SCORE_OUT_OF_RANGE.escalation: Log and emit CCE_ERROR event. Do not forward to CFC.

DRIFT_ABOVE_THRESHOLD.escalation: Forward to CFC with flagged=true and flag_reason=DRIFT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED.

INVALID_INTENT_REFERENCE.description: intent_id does not reference a known IDE intent in the current session.
INVALID_INTENT_REFERENCE.escalation: Log and emit CCE_ERROR event. Do not forward to CFC.
